Name: Verbier International School
Tagline: Verbier International School is a leading private day and boarding school situated in the ski resort of Verbier, Switzerland.
About: At VIS, we focus on care, academic personalisation, and the skills that truly matter, making every student’s journey unique. Together, we are more than a school – we are a community built on a strong sense of belonging.
Philosophy: Verbier International School (VIS) is located in the heart of Verbier, a world-renowned ski resort in the Swiss Alps. Founded in 2011, the school has grown steadily while preserving its close-knit community spirit and strong emphasis on outdoor education.
Outcomes: In October much of the school travels elsewhere. In the Winter Term all students in the secondary school go on expeditions away from Verbier and explore new terrain and sports such as cross country skiing or ski touring.
Admissions: We are delighted that you are considering Verbier International School for your child. Please find below the application steps, which can be completed in any order: You can begin your application today by clicking below to access our online form.
Quote: We warmly guide families through every step of joining VIS, ensuring a smooth transition into life in Verbier for both day students and boarders.

Performance.Academic Integration: as part of the curriculum but also within the After School Activities programme. We offer team and individual sports to enable each student to enjoy many different sports, develop aptitude, show perseverance and remain fit, healthy and active.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: At VIS, students develop a wide range of skills both inside and outside the classroom. Through activities such as tennis, golf, mountain biking, skateboarding, football, basketball, horse riding, swimming, ice hockey, skiing, and snowboarding, they build teamwork, discipline, resilience, and physical confidence.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Verbier International School boasts a diverse faculty with many teachers holding advanced degrees from prestigious Swiss and international universities. Our staff includes certified IB educators and experienced coaches in Alpine sports.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The school's comprehensive pastoral care system includes dedicated house mentors and on-site counselors to support student wellbeing. Boarding students benefit from a nurturing environment that fosters personal growth and community engagement.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Verbier International School have successfully gained admission to top universities worldwide, with a strong record in IB Diploma scores. Students often excel in national and international Alpine sports competitions.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Regular progress reports and biannual parent-teacher meetings ensure transparent communication about student development. As an IB World School, we adhere to rigorous international standards and continuous quality assessments.
